title: Virginia Advances in ACC Tourney with Victory Over NC State
summary: No. 10 Virginia defeats NC State 81-74 for the third time this season in the ACC Tournament. Malik Thomas scored 16 points.
charlotte_impact: Virginia's success in the ACC Tournament impacts their national ranking and chances for the NCAA tournament.

title: Virginia Secures ACC Tournament Win Against NC State
summary: Virginia defeats NC State 81- in the ACC Tournament, led by Malik Thomas with 16 points and Thijs De Ridder with 15.
charlotte_impact: This win is crucial for Virginia's momentum and seeding in upcoming basketball competitions.

title: Virginia and NC State Face Off in ACC Tournament Quarters
summary: Virginia plays NC State in the quarterfinal round of the 2026 ACC Tournament in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: This game is a critical step for both teams in their pursuit of the ACC Tournament title.

title: NC State vs. Virginia: ACC Tournament Odds and Predictions
summary: NC State Wolfpack faces No. 11 Virginia Cavaliers in the ACC Tournament quarterfinal in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: The outcome of this game will significantly affect each team's tournament prospects.

title: Charlotte Faith Leaders Host Interfaith Forum on Black and Palestinian Struggles
summary: Charlotte's interfaith community will hold a panel discussion connecting the Black experience to the Palestinian struggle.
charlotte_impact: This forum promotes dialogue and understanding between different communities in Charlotte.

title: Mother Speaks Out After Son Found Dead in Charlotte
summary: CMPD is investigating the death of a 24-year-old father found in northwest Charlotte. No arrests have been made.
charlotte_impact: This incident raises concerns about safety and crime in the Charlotte community.

title: FTC Targets Hidden Rental Fees Amidst Renters' Concerns
summary: Renters are raising concerns about hidden fees, leading the FTC to investigate rental housing costs nationwide.
charlotte_impact: This investigation could lead to greater transparency and fairness in rental housing costs.

title: Man Found Dead Near Highway in Burke County
summary: Investigators are working to determine the cause of death of a man found near a highway in Burke County.
charlotte_impact: The investigation aims to uncover the circumstances surrounding the man's death.

title: Carolina Migrant Network Reports Increase in ICE Traffic Stops
summary: The Carolina Migrant Network has seen an increase in calls related to ICE traffic stops, rising from eight to 15 per week.
charlotte_impact: This increase indicates heightened immigration enforcement activity in the region.

title: Panthers Trade QB Andy Dalton to Eagles
summary: Andy Dalton, who played three seasons with the Panthers, has been traded to the Eagles, primarily as a backup.
charlotte_impact: This trade impacts the Panthers' quarterback depth and strategy.

title: Queens Royals Make First NCAA Men's Basketball Tournament Appearance
summary: Queens University of Charlotte celebrates its men's basketball team's first-ever NCAA Tournament appearance.
charlotte_impact: This milestone brings pride and recognition to Queens University and the Charlotte community.

title: Family Dollar to Close Matthews Distribution Center, Laying Off Workers
summary: Family Dollar will close its Matthews distribution center by mid-2026, resulting in nearly 400 layoffs.
charlotte_impact: This closure will significantly impact the local economy and the affected workers.

title: Cooler Weather Expected, Followed by Weekend Warm-Up
summary: The weather forecast predicts a cooler Wednesday, with dry conditions for the next week and a warm-up coming for the weekend.
charlotte_impact: Weather affects daily activities and planning for residents in the Charlotte area.

title: Rollover Crash Causes Delays on US 74 Near Matthews
summary: A rollover crash on Independence Boulevard at Interstate 485 is causing major traffic delays.
charlotte_impact: Traffic incidents disrupt commutes and can pose safety risks for drivers.

title: Gaston County Farmers Markets to Accept SNAP Benefits
summary: Farmers markets in Gastonia, Mount Holly, and Belmont will begin accepting SNAP benefits in April.
charlotte_impact: This initiative increases access to fresh, local food for SNAP recipients in Gaston County.
